page_metadata.biotools__summary: A comprehensive database of sequence tagged sites (STSs) derived from STS-based maps and other experiments. STSs are defined by PCR primer pairs and are associated with additional information such as genomic position, genes, and sequences.
page_metadata.bioschemas__name: NCBI database of sequence tagged sites
